headline: war 2026: hormuz blockade, kharg island strikes & ai drone swarms! ⚔️
location: strait of hormuz / tehran / new delhi
hook_text: the world is on edge as the middle east conflict enters a critical phase! from the strategic blockade of the strait of hormuz to massive airstrikes on oil hubs and india's breakthrough in ai drone warfare — here is the viral news you need to know! 🚨⛽🚁

scenes.headline: hormuz strait closed to 'enemy' ships! 🚢
scenes.details: iran has officially banned us and israeli vessels from the strait of hormuz, citing rising military tensions. while the waterway remains open for other nations, the move has sent global oil prices soaring to nearly $100 a barrel as shipping routes are rerouted around africa.
scenes.search_key: strait of hormuz blockade | iran navy us israel ships
scenes.hook_text: will this blockade lead to a global energy crisis?

scenes.headline: trump threatens more strikes on kharg island! 🔥
scenes.details: president trump has warned of further strikes on iran's vital oil export hub at kharg island, claiming previous attacks have already caused massive damage. tehran has vowed intensified retaliation, ruling out any ceasefire until airstrikes on its sovereign territory completely stop.
scenes.search_key: kharg island airstrikes | trump iran war news
scenes.hook_text: is a full-scale regional war now inevitable?

scenes.headline: india reveals ai swarm drone power! 🤖
scenes.details: the indian army has successfully demonstrated a new indigenous ai-enabled swarm drone system designed for autonomous warfare. these drones can communicate in real-time to overwhelm enemy air defenses. tune with us for more such news and subscribe to find out more!
scenes.search_key: india ai swarm drones | indian army autonomous warfare
scenes.hook_text: is bobby deol the most dangerous villain in cinema right now?

subscribe_hook: subscribe to trendwave now for your daily fix of global trends and breaking news! 🌊🌍

checklist.english_only_reminder: this script is in english only.
